infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: We need your location to provide accurate service.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: We need access to your camera to take pictures for medical purposes.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: We need access to your photo library to save pictures for medical purposes.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: We need access to your photo library to select pictures for medical purposes.
infoPlist.NSNotificationsUsageDescription: We need access to send and receive notifications for important updates.

plugins.photosPermission: The app accesses your photos to let you share them with your friends.
